productDisplayName: Basics Men White Slim Fit Shirt
description: Composition White shirt made of 100% cotton, has long sleeves with buttoned cuffs, spread collar, buttoned front placket, patch pockets on the chest with buttoned closures, brand tab on the left pocket, stitch detailing and a curved hemline Fitting Slim Wash care Machine wash separately in cold water using a mild detergent Do not bleach Hang dry in shade Warm iron do not iron on print or embroidery The double patch pockets on the chest and classic colours add rugged styling to this shirt from basics, while the cotton fabric keeps you feeling comfortable all day. Team it with jeans and sneakers. Model statistics Product is a size M on a model of height 5'11' and shoulders 17.5"
